description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu 24.04 that runs on every push to master, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has five jobs: build_clang_meson, build_gcc_meson, build_gcc_cmake, build_gcc_meson_qt6, and build_gcc_cmake_qt6, all running on ubuntu-24.04. Each job checks out the repository, installs necessary dependencies, configures and builds the project using different combinations of compilers (clang/gcc) and build systems (meson/cmake) with or without Qt6, and runs tests.
